title: Support property-local variables and sequence match items

features.name: property-local variable declaration
features.description: Code should include a property-local variable declaration inside a property block

features.name: sequence match item in non-overlapping implication
features.description: Code should include a sequence match item assignment in the antecedent of a non-overlapping implication property

features.name: sequence match item in overlapping implication
features.description: Code should include a sequence match item assignment in the antecedent of an overlapping implication property
